test_primary.title: Verify S2-ARC-CONDITION-EVAL: runs_in_biome + fins_vues condition evaluation

checks.evidence: llm_adapter_map_prompt.gd:96 — `var arc_unlocked: bool = rep_value >= arc_condition_value` always uses rep_value regardless of arc_condition_type. merlin_skeleton_generator.gd:46 — when arc_condition_faction='', rep_value defaults to FACTION_SCORE_START=20. landes_bruyere arc (runs_in_biome, value=3): 20>=3=TRUE → arc ALWAYS unlocked.
Same code path. collines_dolmens: arc_condition_faction='', rep_value=20, arc_condition_value=5. 20>=5=TRUE → collines_dolmens arc ALWAYS unlocked from run 1.

merlin_skeleton_generator.gd:42-46 correctly reads specific faction rep. llm_adapter_map_prompt.gd:59,96 uses the passed rep_value. foret_broceliande(druides>=30), cotes_sauvages(niamh>=30), etc. all correct.
Same bug. arc_condition_faction='', rep_value=FACTION_SCORE_START=20, arc_condition_value=2. 20>=2=TRUE → cercles_pierres arc ALWAYS unlocked, regardless of oghams owned count.

checks.description: landes_bruyere arc unlocks ONLY when biome_runs['landes_bruyere'] >= 3
checks.evidence: Arc is always unlocked (20>=3). Expected: check meta.biome_runs.get('landes_bruyere', 0) >= 3. Actual: always true from run 1.

checks.description: collines_dolmens arc unlocks ONLY when fins_vues >= 5
checks.evidence: Arc always unlocked (20>=5). Expected: check meta.fins_vues >= 5. Context dict (line 62-75) never passes fins_vues or biome_runs.

checks.description: meta.biome_runs dict exists in save schema with all 8 biome keys
checks.evidence: merlin_save_system.gd:36-42 — biome_runs has all 8 biomes with default=0. _validate() required_keys line 248 includes 'biome_runs'.

checks.description: meta.fins_vues field exists in save schema
checks.evidence: merlin_save_system.gd:22 — fins_vues:0 in _get_default_profile(). _validate():279 type-checks it as numeric.

test_primary.root_cause: merlin_skeleton_generator.gd context dict (lines 62-75) never includes biome_runs, fins_vues, or oghams_count. When arc_condition_faction='', rep_value falls back to FACTION_SCORE_START=20, which satisfies ALL non-faction arc conditions (3, 5, 2) by coincidence. Result: 3 out of 8 biomes have permanently unlocked arcs.

test_bonus.title: Verify SAVE-VALIDATE-FINS-VUES: regression test for _validate() additions
test_bonus.note: Partial run — SAVE-FINS-VUES-CLAMP (P31) not yet implemented, CHK-9 skipped

checks.evidence: merlin_save_system.gd:249 — all 4 keys present in required_keys array.
Required_keys loop (line 244-248) calls push_warning + returns false for missing key.

checks.description: fins_vues='corrupted_string' → typeof check triggers false return
checks.evidence: merlin_save_system.gd:279-280 — typeof(meta.get('fins_vues')) != TYPE_INT and != TYPE_FLOAT → push_warning + return false.

checks.description: whispers_seen=null → array check triggers false return
checks.evidence: merlin_save_system.gd:285 — `not (meta.get('whispers_seen') is Array)` → push_warning + return false.

checks.description: echo_memory=[] (Array not Dict) → dict check triggers false return
checks.evidence: merlin_save_system.gd:288-290 — `not (meta.get('echo_memory') is Dictionary)` → push_warning + return false.

checks.description: Existing passing saves regression: factions, anam, oghams
checks.evidence: Existing validates (faction_rep keys loop, oghams structure, anam numeric) all present and unchanged.

checks.description: fins_vues and total_runs clamped to max(0) in load_profile()
checks.evidence: SAVE-FINS-VUES-CLAMP (P31) not yet implemented. Check deferred.

spec10_audit.scope: Performance & Code Quality — recently modified files

findings.issue: := with CONST indexing: `var expected := int(VALID_CODES[code])` — VALID_CODES is a const, must use explicit type annotation
Slightly over limit, acceptable for migration logic
